ticket.customer_message: This is completely unacceptable. I can't believe it.

notes: No actionable detail + charged tone. Low confidence -> escalate.

ticket.customer_message: I have been waiting FOREVER for order A1001!!! Worst service I have ever dealt with.

notes: Contested: angry tone reads like complaint, but the underlying, resolvable intent is order status. Scored as order_status; this is exactly the kind of row reasonable graders disagree on.

ticket.customer_message: I want to return a pair of shoes I bought about three months ago.

notes: Outside 30-day window. Agent should check policy, then escalate rather than deny on its own.
